examples.text: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ
examples.english: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with ʿAad - [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars, […]

etymology.text: From the root ع م د (ʕ m d). Cognate with Hebrew עַמּוּד, Classical Syriac ܥܰܡܽܘܕܳܐ, Ge'ez ዐምድ (ʿämd).
